Fortunately, there is Diandra, a friend who never stops supporting Mutiara and encouraging her to keep going.

programme.title: KAU DITAKDIRKAN UNTUKKU 220
programme.desc: Alya is a tough, independent tomboy girl. He must care for his mother, who has kidney disease, in a life full of challenges. Alya must provide for her family's living expenses in addition to caring for her mother and nephew. After that, he endured difficult work and had to confront the sometimes-difficult realities.

programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick discover a surprising link to their favorite Kelpbed Kid; chaos ensues as everyone in Bikini Bottom starts meeping.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs makes a wish that he could talk to money; SpongeBob competes against a patty-making machine; Squidward trains SpongeBob for a dance contest.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob is challenged by E.V.I.L. to make a delivery to their secret lair in 10 minutes or less; when Mr. Krabs gets trapped inside Pearl's new boat, he must pretend to be its engine to avoid being caught.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton builds a coliseum and holds a gladiator show; SpongeBob and Patrick keep Squidward from concentrating on his music.

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: Blood Hunters: Rise of the Hybri
programme.desc: Gabriella is driven by vengeance after a hybrid monster slaughters her family. On her quest, she joins a squad of Blood Hunters and together they wage war against ruthless underworld warlords, igniting a brutal showdown.

programme.title: 10 Fight 10 Season 3
programme.desc: The show brings Thai superstars, singers, boxers, models and rappers into the celebrity boxing ring. Season 2 features a first ever Thai female match and Season 3 has two Olympics gold medalists competing for the championship. This unique boxing show offers all-round entertainment, with live performances, lavish costumes and real fights with blood!

programme.title: Fierce Cop
programme.desc: To save his son who has been kidnapped by human traffickers, police officer Zhang relentlessly hunts them down and accidentally finds himself implicated in a major child abduction case. In the process, he teams up with a mysterious lady to crack the international crime syndicate and rescue his son.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Song of the Assassins
programme.desc: A young assassin is assigned his first mission while secretly investigating the cause of his family’s massacre years ago. While taking on the mission, he finds himself entangled in a political conspiracy that was planned for years and has to use his skills as an assassin to solve whatever comes his way.

programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: Blind War
programme.desc: Former SWAT captain Dong Gu suffers traumatic visual loss during a failed mission for which he is forced to take responsibility. He manages to get over and adapt to the situation with his daughter’s company, until his nemesis appears and puts his daughter in danger. Despite being blind, Dong Gu must fight to save his daughter.

programme.title: Iron Kung Fu Fist
programme.desc: Liang Kun is a skilled martial arts master who left the martial arts world to protect his lover. However, his disappearance leads to her tragic death and as Liang Kun finds a way to survive in the martial arts world, he fights back to avenge his lover’s death with the help of a beggar gang leader.

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation

programme.title: Army of One
programme.desc: Special Forces agent Brenner and her husband stumble upon an illegal drug compound in the woods while hiking. The drug dealers capture them, kill her husband, and leave her for dead. Not only does Brenner escape alive, she is also seething with rage and vows to hunt down all who murdered her husband and take revenge!

programme.title: Kowloon Walled City
programme.desc: Neng was a street fighter in Northeast China but decides to start a new life in Hong Kong’s Kowloon Walled City. Unfortunately, he is implicated in the fights and conspiracies among the triad forces. When his good friend is hunted down by the triad, Neng must team up with the residents of Kowloon Walled City to fight back and save his friend.

programme.title: Karok La Kau!
programme.desc: Menampilkan seramai 78 orang selebriti berentap antara satu sama lain di pentas karaoke yang luar biasa.

programme.title: Persepsi
programme.desc: DAYA, NADIA dan JESSIE adalah 3 sahabat baik sejak sekolah menengah. Mereka bergerak ke satu wellness resort sebagai satu break dari masalah hidup. Daya cuba nak balik sebab kerja, tetapi dia dihalang.

programme.title: Persepsi
programme.desc: Gadis-gadis itu cuba menyesuaikan diri dengan program itu tetapi mereka masih rasa kekok. Mereka dipujuk untuk duduk di resort oleh kawan mereka yang lain, SHAH dan AZRI yang baru sampai ke resort.

programme.title: Persepsi
programme.desc: Nadia mendapat imbasan masa silam mengenai keguguran anak dia dan Jessie dihantui oleh gadis bermata merah. Jessie dan Shah bertekar pasal business. Daya mendapat satu kejutan yang mengerunkan.

programme.title: Persepsi
programme.desc: Selepas bergaduh, Jessie lari masuk ke hutan diikuti Shah dan rakan-rakan yang lain. Akhirnya Shah menjumpai Jessie tapi mereka terpisah dari lain. Di dalam hutan kelihatan seorang sedang memerhati mereka.

programme.title: Perang Jantina
programme.desc: Pasukan lelaki dan pasukan wanita bersaing antara satu sama lain menyelesaikan tugasan dan cabaran untuk membuktikan jantina mana yang lebih unggul.

programme.title: Renovate
programme.desc: Dihoskan oleh Daiyan Trisha, dia akan mencari rumah yang asalnya biasa atau lama tetapi telah diubahsuai menjadi cantik dengan bantuan arkitek yang berpengalaman.

programme.title: BARISTA: Misi Terpaling Sulit
programme.desc: Perisik legenda dan penganalisis kutu buku, yang merupakan saingan sengit, bekerjasama untuk menjejaki ejen bermuka dua yang mengancam agensi penyiasatan dan mereka mendedahkan konspirasi di luar jangkaan

programme.title: 29 Februari
programme.desc: Kisah cinta terhalang Budi yang dilahirkan pada tahun lompat, 29 Februari 1896 dan hanya dimakan usia empat tahun sekali.

programme.title: Jejak Jepun Jihan
programme.desc: Kembara negara matahari terbit dan nikmati keunikan juga realiti kehidupan masyarakat Jepun selain perkongsian info dan tips untuk mereka yang ingin bercuti ke sana.

programme.title: Halal Maps
programme.desc: Menampilkan sajian kulinari seluruh dunia, Halal Maps menemui penduduk tempatan yang berkongsi hidangan Halal kegemaran di bandar mereka, di mana mendapatkannya dan bagaimana menuju ke sana.

programme.desc: Perubahan sikap Syawal yang tidak mudah marah apabila melihat Jannah dan Zakri bersama. Jannah berasa kesal apabila mendapat tahu tentang rancangan Daniel untuk memisahkan dirinya dengan Syawal.

programme.title: Hijrah Jannah
programme.desc: Jannah semakin rimas dengan Zakri yang sentiasa cuba mencari peluang untuk berjumpa dengannya. Syawal terpaksa berdepan dengan sikap Munirah yang semakin biadap dengan Puan Sri Rafidah yang sakit.

programme.title: Hijrah Jannah
programme.desc: Kehilangan Munirah mengejutkan Syawal dan keluarga mereka. Syawal cuba mencari Munirah yang disangka merajuk. Jannah mengambil peluang untuk menjaga Puan Sri Rafidah yang sakit.

programme.title: Hijrah Jannah
programme.desc: Hubungan Jannah dan Puan Sri Rafidah semakin baik. Rasa terganggu dengan perubahan Zakri, Jannah berjumpa dengan Zarina dan memintanya untuk menasihati Zakri.

programme.title: Hijrah Jannah

programme.desc: Feature documentary studying the history of the sharks species, alongside their anatomy and how they've helped our oceans for hundreds of millions of years. programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: Back in Eastern Europe, Catfish and Rooftop start their visit Ukraine dropping into the country via skydive. The adventures only get crazier from there- from wrangling pigs and racing ostriches to testing out if their heads can survive a Spetsnaz bottle break. After testing out the bottle break the duo move onto sambo, a Soviet style of wrestling and equally challenging event. The BMX bikers becom

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: With their travels taking them to Asia, Rooftop and Catfish find themselves spending several dangerous days in Bangladesh. The pair put their bodies and safety to the test harvesting honey the Bangladeshi way, transporting workers via row boat, deconstructing ships for scrap metal, and trying to clean one of the country's rare public restrooms. They test out Bangladeshi cuisine in the form of fish

programme.desc: Martial artists join Red Lotus Flower Society to overthrow evil emperor. Governor hunts society members. Kung fu practitioner falls for merchant's daughter amid kung fu contest for her hand. Gender role reversal comedy ensues.
